name: build_quadrant_phase2
outcome_goal: Integrate QuadrantGrid into App.tsx and add backend API endpoints

jobs.label: integrate_and_apis
jobs.prompt:
You are working at the Praxis repository root. Two tasks:

TASK 1: Modify Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/App.tsx

The current App.tsx fetches a manifest from /api/manifests/:id and renders it via SlotLayout. Add support for v2 quadrant manifests:

- If the manifest JSON has a 'version' field equal to 2 and a 'quadrants' key, render <QuadrantGrid manifest={data} /> instead of <SlotLayout>
- Import QuadrantGrid from './grid/QuadrantGrid'
- Import './modules' to trigger module registrations
- Keep full backward compatibility with v1 manifests (SlotLayout still works)
- The v2 manifest shape is: { version: 2, grid: '4x4', title?: string, quadrants: Record<string, { module: string, span?: string, config?: Record<string, unknown> }> }
- Also keep the existing binding execution (executeBindings) for v1 manifests

TASK 2: Add GET API endpoints to Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/workflow_api.py

The file has a do_GET method in DispatchAPIHandler. Add these endpoints following the existing pattern (the /api/platform-overview endpoint is a good reference):

- GET /api/bugs — returns { bugs: [{bug_id, title, severity, status, category, opened_at}], count: N }
  Query: SELECT bug_id, title, severity, status, category, opened_at FROM bugs ORDER BY opened_at DESC LIMIT 50

- GET /api/models — returns { models: [{name, provider, model, status, tags}] }
  Query: SELECT DISTINCT provider_slug, model_slug, status, capability_tags FROM provider_model_candidates WHERE status = 'active'

- GET /api/registries/search?q=QUERY — searches all 3 registries, returns merged results
  Uses plainto_tsquery on registry_ui_components, registry_calculations, registry_workflows
  Returns: { results: [{id, name, description, kind, category}], count: N }

- GET /api/workflows — returns { workflows: [{id, name, status, node_count}] }
  Query: SELECT w.workflow_definition_id, w.workflow_id, count(n.*) as node_count FROM workflow_definitions w LEFT JOIN workflow_definition_nodes n ON ... GROUP BY ...

All endpoints use self.subsystems.get_pg_conn() for Postgres access. All return JSON with Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * header.

Write the changes. Don't break any existing functionality.
